response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, craft-focused senior engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, and systems work, including genuine high-scale experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic and current hands-on AI-agent tooling. However, the role is a Principal (IC6) position centered on experimentation platforms, growth measurement, telemetry, and statistical analysis, and the resume shows no experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flighting, or metrics-platform experience, nor evidence of leading multi-team, multi-workstream initiatives at enterprise scale. His trajectory is strong senior IC at small-to-mid companies, which falls short of the principal scope and domain depth this role demands.
strengths: Deep, broad engineering fundamentals with strong testing/TDD craftsmanship and open-source contributions
Real high-throughput distributed-systems experience (low-latency services handling millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic)
Current hands-on AI tooling experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow infrastructure) matching the AI-first emphasis
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core of the role
No demonstrated principal-level scope: multi-team initiatives, cross-org influence, or platform ownership across products
Limited evidence of statistical analysis, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, or data-science partnership experience

key_factors.factor: Scale and engineering fundamentals (high-throughput systems, testing culture)
